title: Animation’s AI Reckoning: Filmmakers Say They Can Make Movies for 90% Less
description: Some animators believe AI will make films better. Others believe it will bring costs down.

title: Chinese Spies, Smuggled Drugs Fuel Takaichi’s Security Push
description: Chinese spies stealing Japanese industrial secrets in boardrooms. Chip smugglers ferrying Nvidia’s prized artificial intelligence semiconductors via Japan. Drug gangs quietly slipping fentanyl across Japan’s borders to a US opioid crisis.

title: Soaring iPad, Xbox Prices Reveal Pain of Memory Chip Mess
description: Within a span of five hours Thursday, Apple Inc. and Microsoft Corp. hiked the prices for such popular products as Xbox video-game consoles, Macs and iPads.
